atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports numbness and tingling in the fingers

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain in the wrist

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a gradual onset of numbness and tingling in the fingers approximately three months ago

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the numbness and tingling occurs most frequently at night

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the numbness and tingling necessitates shaking hands

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports wrist pain has been experienced for several months

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain and numbness are exacerbated by nighttime sleep

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain is a dull ache

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals diminished left hand grip strength

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Tinel's sign is positive bilaterally

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Palpation of the left wrist reveals tenderness

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports dropping things more often due to decreased sensation

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any recent injuries or trauma

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any history of rheumatoid arthritis

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's clinical presentation and physical exam findings are consistent with carpal tunnel syndrome

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports left hand symptoms

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes ibuprofen 600 milligrams every six hours

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans a follow-up in two weeks

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician instructs the patient to consider modifying landscaping activities

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans a nurse discharge

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes a wrist splint
